changes.description: Added review_impact() method to ContextGraph: auto-indexes, runs impact analysis on changed files, deduplicates, returns structured dict
Added _graph_impact_section() helper and wired impactAnalysis key into write_review() contract dict
Added graph-blast-radius CLI subcommand with --repo, --files, --json flags
Added 4 tests for review_impact() covering structured output, empty files, unknown files, multi-file aggregation
Created 3 tests for _graph_impact_section() covering enabled/disabled/empty states
Added 5 tests for graph-blast-radius CLI covering help, empty repo, dependencies, JSON output, multiple files
